queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of lacking a checking account on credit default probability and its contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Determinants of default associated with negative checking account balances and their empirical relationship with mitigated credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: between 4 and 7 years.
queries.question: Statistical evaluation of present employment duration between four and seven years as a credit risk driver and its empirical contribution to reduced default probability.
